name: Scary Tales: Horror School
short_description: Scary Tales: Horror School is a first-person survival horror game with three intense chapters—escape a haunted school, rescue a missing son from a chainsaw-wielding butcher, and soon, confront ancient black magic. Can you survive the nightmare?
detailed_description:
Scary Tales: Horror School – A Terrifying First-Person Horror Adventure

Trapped in an abandoned school haunted by dark entities, you must find a way to escape before it’s too late. Eerie corridors, spine-chilling whispers, and a sinister past lurk around every corner—every step you take could be your last.

Storyline - Chapter 1

You were once a cheerful schoolboy, enjoying carefree days of laughter and play. But one fateful mistake changed everything—you stepped into a forbidden room, only to come face-to-face with an unspeakable evil. The last thing you remember is the horrifying figure of a devil before everything went dark.

Now, you wake up in a locked, shadowy room, the air thick with whispers and unseen presences. The only way out? Solve the puzzles, navigate the nightmares, and escape the haunted school… or become another lost soul trapped within its walls.

Game Features & Mechanics

  • Three Destinations, Three Puzzles – Explore the haunted school and uncover three different escape routes. Each requires solving a unique puzzle to unlock its exit.

  • 👻 Dynamic Challenges – Every destination presents a distinct horror experience, testing your ability to think fast, solve mind-bending puzzles, and survive relentless supernatural encounters.

  • Multiple Escape Possibilities – Whether you crack cryptic codes, piece together hidden clues, or outsmart otherworldly forces, your choices will determine your fate.

  • Replayability & Choice-Driven Gameplay – Each playthrough offers a new experience, as you decide which path to take and which horrors to face.

Will You Escape… or Become Another Victim?

Face your fears, solve the mysteries, and find your way out before the darkness consumes you.

Storyline - Chapter 2

A Father enters a cursed school on a mission to rescue his missing son. The school has become a twisted nightmare, crawling with flesh-hungry zombies, deranged staff, and a brutal terror known as The Butcher—a monstrous, chainsaw-wielding creature born of rage and violence. He doesn’t speak. He hunts. 

Game Features & Mechanics

  • Three Digit Code Puzzle: Explore the haunted school to uncover a hidden 3-digit code—the only way to open the final door and save your son.

  • Weapon & Tools: Scavenge for guns, grenades, and melee weapons scattered across classrooms and corridors. Use them wisely—resources are limited, and danger is constant.

  • The Butcher: A relentless horror with a roaring chainsaw. He can’t be reasoned with… and he can’t be stopped.

  • Undead Enemies: Face off against zombies and corrupted faculty that roam the halls. Choose to fight, sneak, or flee—each choice matters.

Will You Save The Son… or Become Another Victim?

📌 Wishlist Now on Steam!

supported_languages: English, French, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
